title: Veratramine alleviates asthmatic airway remodelling via the PKM2/CREB1 lactylation/SMAD7 axis.
publicationName: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
journalName: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
snippet: Veratramine is a natural steroidal alkaloid derived from plants of the genus Veratrum that exhibits anti-inflammatory potential. However, its pharmacological mechanisms and direct molecular targets in asthmatic airway remodelling remain unclear, particularly regarding its role in regulating metabolism-epigenetic crosstalk within the airway microenvironment....
